patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Flag all VARIANCE risk factors before publishing; require mitigation note in card when this pattern appears.
Flag all MODEL_ERROR risk factors before publishing; require mitigation note in card when this pattern appears.

adjustments_for_today: Two or more MODEL_ERROR total losses yesterday: require second-pass validation on all over/total picks before publishing; cross-check run environment metrics and bullpen usage.
monitoring_list: Starter confirmation for K prop picks — verify within 90 min of first pitch
Over/total thesis in games with ace starters — revisit run environment
NYY home underdog risk — monitor trend
carryover_rules: When stacking K over and Under total on the same starter, require ERA below 3.50 in last 5 starts and minimum 5 innings pitched average in last 3 starts before publishing both as separate picks.
